name: RCMRD Geoportal
operator: Regional Centre for Mapping of Resources for Development (RCMRD)
dataType: Land cover, land degradation, wetlands, biodiversity, conservation
description: Intergovernmental geoportal serving 20 Eastern and Southern African member states with land, environment and conservation geospatial data.

name: RCMRD Open Data
operator: Regional Centre for Mapping of Resources for Development (RCMRD)
dataType: Administrative boundaries, elevation, land use, climate, infrastructure
description: Open data hub of RCMRD providing downloadable geographic datasets, web maps and applications for Eastern and Southern Africa.

name: AfriGEO GeoPortal
operator: African Group on Earth Observations (AfriGEO) / GEO
dataType: Earth observation, environment, climate, land, water
description: Pan-African Earth observation coordination portal linking GEO activities with national capabilities across the African continent.

name: South African Weather Service (SAWS)
dataType: Weather forecasts, lightning, storms, climate data
description: South Africa's national meteorological service providing weather forecasts, warnings, lightning and storm data, and historical climate records.

name: NIWIS - National Integrated Water Information System
dataType: Dam levels, river flows, groundwater, water quality, drought status
description: South Africa's integrated water information system with 40+ dashboards covering dam levels, river flows, groundwater, water quality and drought status.

name: DWS Hydrological Services - Surface Water
dataType: River flow, rainfall, evaporation, verified hydrological records
description: Verified surface water hydrological data from South Africa's national gauging station network, organised by drainage regions and primary catchments.

name: Survey of Kenya (SOK)
dataType: Topographic maps, geodetic data, cadastral surveys, aerial photography
description: Kenya's official national surveying and mapping organization responsible for geodetic control, topographic mapping and cadastral surveys since 1903.

name: NEMA Kenya - Environmental Data
dataType: Environmental impact assessments, pollution data, conservation areas
description: Kenya's national environmental authority providing EIA reports, pollution monitoring data, and environmental conservation information.

name: Kenya Natural Resources Geoportal
dataType: Land use, natural resources, administrative boundaries, environmental data
description: Kenya's centralised geoportal for natural resources and land information managed by the National Land Commission.

name: NGSA Geological Database - Nigeria
dataType: Mineral occurrences, geological maps, geophysical surveys, airborne magnetic/radiometric
description: Nigeria's geological survey database with mineral occurrence records across 36 states, airborne magnetic/radiometric data, and geological maps.

name: GRID3 Nigeria Geospatial Portal
dataType: Settlement extents, population estimates, boundaries, health facilities, schools
description: Geo-referenced infrastructure and demographic data for Nigeria, integrating geospatial data on population, settlements, boundaries and key facilities.

name: Egyptian Space Agency (EgSA)
dataType: Satellite imagery, remote sensing, earth observation
description: Egypt's national space agency succeeding NARSS, providing satellite imagery and remote sensing data for agriculture, urban planning and national security.

name: EGSMA - Egyptian Geological Survey and Mining Authority
operator: Egyptian Geological Survey and Mining Authority (EGSMA)
dataType: Geological maps, mineral resources, structural geology, geomorphology
description: Egypt's geological survey authority producing geological, structural, tectonic and mineral belt maps at scales from 1:50,000 to 1:2,000,000.

name: Ethiopian Meteorological Institute (EMI)
dataType: Weather forecasts, climate data, rainfall, temperature, agrometeorological bulletins
description: Ethiopia's national meteorological institute delivering weather forecasts, climate services, seasonal outlooks and agrometeorological bulletins.

name: Geological Survey of Ethiopia (GSE)
dataType: Geological maps, mineral exploration, geothermal, hydrogeology, geochemistry
description: Ethiopia's autonomous geological survey agency providing geological mapping, mineral exploration data, geothermal assessments and hydrogeological studies.

name: EthioGIS MapServer
dataType: Administrative boundaries, elevation, land use, infrastructure, inland waters
description: Web-based open platform for disseminating Ethiopian geospatial data, maps and information including satellite imagery, boundaries, and thematic layers.

name: Tanzania Meteorological Authority (TMA)
dataType: Weather forecasts, climate data, rainfall, temperature, agrometeorological advisories
description: Tanzania's national meteorological authority providing weather forecasts, climate services, warnings and agrometeorological advisories via CLIDATA system.

name: Tanzania NBS Statistical & GIS Portal
dataType: Census data, demographic statistics, economic indicators, administrative boundaries (shapefiles)
description: Tanzania's integrated statistical portal with GIS capabilities, providing census data, demographic surveys, SDG indicators and administrative boundary shapefiles.

name: Tanzania Open Data Portal
dataType: Multi-domain open data including health, education, water, agriculture
description: Tanzania's national open data platform providing machine-readable datasets across health, education, water, agriculture and governance sectors.

name: Ghana Meteorological Agency (GMet)
dataType: Weather forecasts, climate data, rainfall, temperature, marine weather
description: Ghana's national meteorological agency collecting, processing and archiving weather and climate observations through its CLIDATA database system.

name: CERSGIS - Centre for Remote Sensing and GIS, Ghana
operator: Centre for Remote Sensing and Geographic Information Services (CERSGIS), University of Ghana
dataType: Land use, urban mapping, environmental monitoring, remote sensing
description: Ghana's leading GIS and remote sensing centre at the University of Ghana providing geospatial data, mapping services and capacity building.

name: Ghana Open Data Portal
dataType: Socioeconomic indicators, census, agriculture, health, education statistics
description: Ghana's national open data portal with socioeconomic indicators, census results and sectoral statistics with interactive visualisation tools.

name: ANCFCC Geoportal - Morocco
operator: Agence Nationale de la Conservation Foncière, du Cadastre et de la Cartographie (ANCFCC)
dataType: Cadastral maps, land registry, topographic maps, cartographic data
description: Morocco's national land registry and cadastre agency providing cadastral information, topographic mapping and cartographic services through an open-source GIS platform.

name: DGM - Direction Générale de la Météorologie, Morocco
dataType: Weather forecasts, climate normals, radar, satellite imagery, marine weather
description: Morocco's national meteorological service providing weather forecasts, climate data and sectoral meteorological services across six regional directorates.

name: Géoportail National du Maroc
dataType: Topographic, administrative boundaries, land use, orthophoto, elevation
description: Morocco's national geoportal providing access to topographic maps, administrative boundaries, orthophoto coverage and thematic spatial data layers.

name: OTC Cadastral Geoportal - Tunisia
operator: Office de la Topographie et du Cadastre (OTC)
dataType: Cadastral maps, property boundaries, topographic surveys, geodetic data
description: Tunisia's cadastral geoportal enabling interactive access to cadastral information with decentralised regional data management through Web-GIS.

name: INM - Institut National de la Météorologie, Tunisia
dataType: Weather forecasts, climate normals 1981-2010, ALADIN model output, SPI drought index, climate projections to 2100
description: Tunisia's national meteorological institute providing weather data, climate normals, ALADIN-Tunisia 7.5 km forecasts, SPI drought index and climate projections to 2100.

name: Tunisia Open Data Portal
dataType: Multi-domain open data including meteorology, transport, environment, statistics
description: Tunisia's national CKAN-based open data catalogue hosting datasets from government agencies including INM meteorological data and transport datasets.

name: INCT - Institut National de Cartographie et de Télédétection, Algeria
operator: Institut National de Cartographie et de Télédétection (INCT)
dataType: Topographic maps, thematic maps, remote sensing data, geodetic data
description: Algeria's national cartography and remote sensing institute producing topographic maps at 1:50,000 for the north and 1:200,000 for the south, plus thematic mapping.

name: ONM - Office National de la Météorologie, Algeria
dataType: Weather forecasts, climate data, rainfall, temperature, warnings
description: Algeria's national meteorological office operating 82 weather stations and 300+ climatological posts across six regional directorates, providing forecasts and climate data.

name: CENACARTA - National Cartography and Remote Sensing Centre, Mozambique
operator: Centro Nacional de Cartografia e Teledetecção (CENACARTA)
dataType: Topographic maps, administrative boundaries, satellite imagery, thematic mapping
description: Mozambique's national cartography centre providing baseline GIS data, satellite imagery, topographic and thematic maps at 1:250,000 scale, and disaster management support.

name: INAM - Instituto Nacional de Meteorologia, Mozambique
dataType: Weather forecasts, cyclone warnings, coastal forecasts, climate data
description: Mozambique's national meteorological institute providing weather forecasts, cyclone tracking, coastal forecasts (FEWS-INAM) and climate services via three regional centres.

name: UBOS Data Portals - Uganda
dataType: Census, demographic, socioeconomic, SDG indicators, GIS data
description: Uganda's statistical data hub providing census results, SDG indicators, microdata archives and ArcGIS Online geospatial datasets via multiple integrated portals.

name: UNMA - Uganda National Meteorological Authority
dataType: Weather forecasts, seasonal outlooks, dekadal bulletins, climate data
description: Uganda's national meteorological authority providing forecasts from nowcasting to seasonal scale, dekadal bulletins and climate outlook services via UNMA maproom.

name: GéoSénégal - National Geoportal
dataType: Administrative boundaries, land use, agriculture, blue economy, social services
description: Senegal's national geoportal under the National Geomatics Plan providing spatial data on agriculture, blue economy, social services and territorial governance.

name: ANACIM - Senegal Meteorological Service
operator: Agence Nationale de l'Aviation Civile et de la Météorologie (ANACIM)
dataType: Weather forecasts, climate data, rainfall, temperature, climate projections
description: Senegal's meteorological service providing weather forecasts, climate data from 23 stations and an interactive climate projection geoportal (CLIMAP).

name: INC Geoportail - Cameroon National Cartographic Institute
dataType: Topographic maps, administrative boundaries, localities database, thematic maps
description: Cameroon's national cartographic geoportal providing topographic base maps, the National File of Localities, administrative boundaries and ISO 19115-compliant geographic data.

name: Cameroon Open Data Portal (INS)
dataType: Socioeconomic indicators, census, agriculture, health, education statistics
description: Cameroon's national statistics open data portal providing socioeconomic indicators, census results and thematic map creation tools under CC-BY 4.0 licence.

name: Rwanda Land Administration Information System (LAIS)
operator: Rwanda Land Management and Use Authority (RLMUA) / National Land Authority
dataType: Land parcels, property ownership, land classification, titling records
description: Rwanda's land administration information portal providing property ownership details, land classifications and titling data built on Esri ArcGIS technology.

name: Meteo Rwanda - Rwanda Meteorology Agency
dataType: Weather forecasts, climate data, rainfall, temperature, seasonal outlooks
description: Rwanda's national meteorology agency providing forecasts, historical climate data (1961-present), and an interactive Map Room with rainfall and temperature climatologies.

name: Rwanda Geoportal - National SDI
dataType: Administrative boundaries, infrastructure, environment, health, agriculture
description: Rwanda's national spatial data infrastructure geoportal hosting geospatial data from public and private institutions for sectoral planning and implementation.

name: Algeria Open Data Portal
dataType: Multi-domain open data including geography, statistics, agriculture
description: Algeria's national open government data portal providing datasets across geography, statistics, agriculture and other sectors.

name: Mozambique Open Data Portal
dataType: Socioeconomic indicators, agriculture, health, climate, infrastructure
description: Mozambique's open data resources aggregated through the Open Data for Africa platform, including socioeconomic, agricultural and health indicators.
